picks.title: Heeramandi: The Diamond Bazaar
picks.stars: Manisha Koirala, Sonakshi Sinha, Aditi Rao Hydari
picks.desc: Sanjay Leela Bhansali's magnum opus — a lavish saga of courtesans in pre-independence Lahore. Visually stunning and emotionally gripping. Perfect weekend binge.

picks.title: IC 814: The Kandahar Hijack
picks.stars: Vijay Varma, Naseeruddin Shah, Pankaj Kapur
picks.desc: Gripping retelling of the 1999 Indian Airlines hijacking. One of the best Indian web series in years — tense, authentic, and brilliantly acted.

picks.title: Mirzapur Season 3
picks.stars: Pankaj Tripathi, Ali Fazal, Shweta Tripathi
picks.desc: The Mirzapur saga continues. Bigger, bloodier, and more politically charged than ever. A must-watch if you've followed the series.

picks.title: Panchayat Season 3
picks.stars: Jitendra Kumar, Raghubir Yadav, Neena Gupta
picks.desc: The most heartwarming Indian series on streaming. An NRI nostalgia trip — rural India, bureaucratic chaos, and characters you fall in love with.

picks.title: Citadel: Honey Bunny
picks.desc: India's entry into the Citadel universe — slick production, fun chemistry, and non-stop action set across 90s Mumbai and Delhi.

picks.title: Maharaj
picks.desc: Junaid Khan's debut — a powerful historical drama about a defamation trial in 1862 Bombay. Jaideep Ahlawat is exceptional.

picks.title: Farzi
picks.stars: Shahid Kapoor, Vijay Sethupathi, Kay Kay Menon
picks.desc: A slick cat-and-mouse thriller about counterfeit currency. Shahid Kapoor at his best. Vijay Sethupathi as the cop is unforgettable. Season 2 confirmed.

picks.title: The Buckingham Murders
picks.desc: Kareena Kapoor's OTT debut — a British whodunit with an Indian detective. Understated and atmospheric. Great for fans of slow-burn crime dramas.

picks.title: Taaza Khabar Season 2
picks.desc: The feel-good series about a Mumbai drain worker granted a superpower returns. Fun, warm, and binge-worthy.

picks.title: Dhurandhar
picks.stars: Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, R. Madhavan
picks.desc: Ranveer Singh's high-octane action film now streaming on Netflix after a successful theatrical run. Great for a Saturday night action binge.
